On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 3:27 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com> wrote:

> missing the last four of the SSN
>
> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 2:53 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> wrote:
>
>>
>>
>> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:55 AM Ashley Glass <
>> Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org> wrote:
>>
>>> Hello,
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> Attached are the forms we need back completed in order to change your
>>> status from “adult” to “Live in Aid”. Once the reasonable accommodation and
>>> Subsidy Standard Exception forms are submitted, they need to be approved,
>>> and once it is approved we can update the status.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *Ashley Glass *
>>>
>>> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>>>
>>> 503-802-8315
>>>
>>> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download
>>> documents from the participant portal at
>>>
>>> https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service
>>> window.
>>>
>>> The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM –
>>> noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>>> *Sent:* Wednesday, April 1, 2026 10:51 AM
>>> *To:* Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
>>> *Subject:* Re: Additional Information Needed
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> 🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do
>>> NOT click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and
>>> know the content is safe. *Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender"
>>> list.* :CAUTION  🛑
>>>
>>> Okay that is fine please do that
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:48 AM Ashley Glass <
>>> Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org> wrote:
>>>
>>> Hello,
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> You are correct that a live in aids income is not counted so it would
>>> not be relevant, but you’re not listed as a live in aid. The paperwork we
>>> received from Clackamas County lists you as just an adult in the household.
>>> I can send over the forms and we can get the updated though, just let me
>>> know and I will email them over.
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *Ashley Glass *
>>>
>>> Rent Assistance Services Coordinator
>>>
>>> 503-802-8315
>>>
>>> [image: Logo Description automatically generated]
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> If you need to report any household or income changes, you can download
>>> documents from the participant portal at
>>>
>>> https://portal.homeforward.org/Forms/Participant
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> You can pick up forms or drop off packets at our customer service
>>> window.
>>>
>>> The customer service window is open Tuesday – Thursday from 9:00AM –
>>> noon and 1:00PM - 3:00PM at 135 SW Ash Street
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> *From:* benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>>> *Sent:* Wednesday, April 1, 2026 10:43 AM
>>> *To:* Ashley Glass <Ashley.Glass@homeforward.org>
>>> *Subject:* Re: Additional Information Needed
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> 🛑  CAUTION: This email is NOT from a Home Forward email address. Do
>>> NOT click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and
>>> know the content is safe. *Home Forward does NOT have a "Safe Sender"
>>> list.* :CAUTION  🛑
>>>
>>> Anyways I believe I was told that this is irrelevant given that I have a
>>> reasonable accommodation as my mothers live in care giver
>>>
>>>
>>>
>>> On Wed, Apr 1, 2026 at 10:36 AM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>>> wrote:
>>>
>>> He created worldwide software as a trust over year ago in 2026, and
>>> funded it with $150,000 so that I can produce free software to automate the
>>> legal industry, by converting the entire legal corpus into first order
>>> logic, so that the entire legal corpus can be compiled like a programming
>>> language is compiled. That work is supposed to be open sourced with
>>> Stanford Law School, and the Linux Foundation, to
subject: Re: Additional Information Needed
